import os

comfy_out = r'D:\server\ComfyUI_windows_portable\ComfyUI\output'
out = []
for f in os.listdir(comfy_out):
    path = os.path.join(comfy_out, f)
    if os.path.isfile(path) and not f.endswith('.png'):
        size = os.path.getsize(path)
        out.append(f'{f}: {size}')

result = chr(10).join(out) if out else 'No non-png files'
